_about: Cross-wave question mapping: historical normalised title -> 2025 normalised
title (both via the shared norm(): lowercase, collapse whitespace, strip
non-alphanumerics). Mirrors the tracker module's question-mapper config:
only same-metric rewordings are mapped; restructured batteries (WIL split
per programme, practicum 'part 2', support-hub service breakouts) are NOT
mapped and correctly show no history. Review when 2026 titles change.

_judgment_calls.the health and wellbeing emotional suppo: renamed to 'student wellness and counselling support' in 2025 — same battery slot
_judgment_calls.the academic support you receive from st: Student Services became the Student Support and Development Team — same metric
